title: rubus holtenii
intro: Rubus holtenii, also known as Holten's raspberry or Holten's bramble, is a species of bramble in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus holtenii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially inhibiting the growth of cancer cells. Rubus holtenii can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and fever.
